subcodes.title: Words spoken at Pleiades Sylvan Bower, Alhammeh near Tiberias, 1914-05-06
subcodes.first_line: It is very strange how the possession of a few spans of earth blinds men to justice and fairness. He become neglectful and heedless
subcodes.subjects: @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
